title: PowerPoint to PDF Converter — Offline & Free
h1: Convert PowerPoint Presentations to PDF Instantly
description: Convert .pptx presentations to high-quality PDFs directly in your browser. No cloud needed. Perfect for presenters in Madrid.

sections.title: Why Convert Presentations Offline?
sections.content: Your slides may contain unreleased products or confidential strategies. Convert without risking data exposure.

sections.title: How to Convert PowerPoint to PDF

steps.title: Load Presentation
steps.description: Select your .pptx file from your device.

steps.title: Select Slide Range
steps.description: Include all slides or specific ones.

steps.title: Download PDF
steps.description: Get your PDF with all formatting preserved.

sections.title: Presentation Conversion in Madrid
sections.content: Presenters in Madrid trust us to convert slide decks without leaking unreleased content to cloud servers.

sections.title: Confidential Slides Stay Confidential
sections.content: Pre-launch product decks? Board presentations? Converted 100% locally without network access.

sections.title: Instant Slide Export
sections.content: Convert 100-slide decks in seconds. No queue, no waiting, no upload bandwidth wasted.

faqs.a: Animations are flattened into static PDF frames.
High-resolution rendering at 150 DPI by default.

faqs.q: Can I convert selected slides only?
faqs.a: Yes, specify slide ranges like 1-10 or 5,8,12.
